sql_array: CREATE TABLE my_intervals (start UInt32, end UInt32);
SELECT maxIntersectionsPosition(-start, end) FROM my_intervals WHERE -end > 0 GROUP BY start HAVING start IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE my_events (event_time DateTime, start_time UInt32, end_time UInt32);
INSERT INTO my_events VALUES (now(), 1, 3), (now(), NULL, 5), (now(), -1, 4), (now(), 3, NULL);
SELECT maxIntersectionsPosition(start_time, end_time) FROM my_events WHERE start_time IS NOT NULL AND end_time IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE test_data (id UInt32, value String);
SELECT maxIntersectionsPosition(CAST('-1' AS UInt32), CAST(NULL AS UInt32)) FROM test_data WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE value LIKE 'test%') GROUP BY value HAVING count(*) > 1;
SELECT -maxIntersectionsPosition(start, end) FROM (SELECT start, end FROM my_intervals) WHERE end IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_intervals AS SELECT start, end FROM my_intervals WHERE start > 0;
SELECT maxIntersectionsPosition(-start, -end) FROM temp_intervals GROUP BY end HAVING maxIntersectionsPosition(start, end) IS NOT NULL;
